name: quickwit_indexing_processed_bytes
definition: Total bytes processed by the indexing pipeline. Primary throughput KPI for indexers.
absence_means: No indexer running or no active pipelines

name: quickwit_indexing_processed_docs_total
definition: Total documents processed by the indexing pipeline.
absence_means: No indexer running or no active pipelines

name: quickwit_write_bytes
definition: Total bytes written to local storage by the indexing pipeline.
absence_means: No indexer running or no writes occurring

name: quickwit_search_leaf_searches_splits_total
definition: Total number of splits touched by leaf searches. Indicates search fan-out.
absence_means: No searcher running or no queries executed

name: quickwit_ingest_grpc_requests_total
definition: Total ingest gRPC requests. Labeled by rpc method and status.
absence_means: No ingest service running
cardinality_footguns: context.rpc is bounded; context.status has error/ok values

name: quickwit_metastore_grpc_requests_total
definition: Total metastore gRPC requests. Filter by context.status for error rate.
absence_means: No metastore service running

name: quickwit_ingest_grpc_request_duration_seconds
definition: Histogram of ingest gRPC request durations in seconds.
absence_means: No ingest service running

name: quickwit_metastore_grpc_request_duration_seconds
definition: Histogram of metastore gRPC request durations in seconds.
absence_means: No metastore service running

name: quickwit_indexing_backpressure_micros
definition: Cumulative microseconds of backpressure experienced by indexing pipelines. Non-zero indicates pipeline throttling.
absence_means: No indexer running or no backpressure (healthy)

name: quickwit_memory_allocated_bytes
definition: Total bytes allocated by the application (jemalloc stats.allocated).
absence_means: Metric scraping not working or jemalloc disabled

name: quickwit_memory_resident_bytes
definition: Total bytes in physically resident data pages (jemalloc stats.resident). Closest proxy to actual memory footprint.
absence_means: Metric scraping not working or jemalloc disabled

name: quickwit_memory_in_flight_data_bytes
definition: Bytes of data currently in-flight within the indexing pipeline. Labeled by component (rest_server wal indexer etc).
absence_means: No indexer running or no data in pipeline

name: quickwit_indexing_ongoing_merge_operations
definition: Number of merge operations currently in progress.
absence_means: No indexer running or no merges needed

name: quickwit_indexing_pending_merge_operations
definition: Number of merge operations waiting to be executed. Growing count indicates merge backlog.
absence_means: No indexer running or merges keeping up

name: quickwit_ingest_grpc_requests_in_flight
definition: Number of ingest gRPC requests currently being processed.
absence_means: No ingest service running

name: quickwit_ingest_shards
definition: Number of ingest shards by state (open/closed). Ingest v2 only.
absence_means: Ingest v1 in use (shards not applicable)

name: quickwit_ingest_wal_disk_used_bytes
definition: Bytes of disk used by the write-ahead log. Ingest v2 only.
absence_means: Ingest v1 in use or WAL not configured
cardinality_footguns: Known issue: may show constant value (GitHub #5547)

name: quickwit_ingest_wal_memory_used_bytes
definition: Bytes of memory used by the write-ahead log. Ingest v2 only.
absence_means: Ingest v1 in use or WAL not configured

name: quickwit_storage_object_storage_gets_total
definition: Total number of GET requests to object storage (S3).
absence_means: No storage operations (no indexing or search)

name: quickwit_storage_object_storage_puts_total
definition: Total number of PUT requests to object storage (S3).
absence_means: No storage operations (no indexing)

name: quickwit_storage_object_storage_download_num_bytes
definition: Total bytes downloaded from object storage (S3).
absence_means: No storage downloads (no search)

name: quickwit_storage_object_storage_upload_num_bytes
definition: Total bytes uploaded to object storage (S3).
absence_means: No storage uploads (no indexing)

name: quickwit_cache_cache_hits_total
definition: Total cache hits across all cache types.
absence_means: No searcher running or cache disabled

name: quickwit_cache_cache_misses_total
definition: Total cache misses across all cache types.
absence_means: No searcher running or cache disabled

name: quickwit_cache_in_cache_count
definition: Number of objects currently in cache.
absence_means: No searcher running or cache disabled

name: quickwit_cache_in_cache_num_bytes
definition: Total bytes currently held in cache.
absence_means: No searcher running or cache disabled

name: quickwit_quickwit_janitor_gc_deleted_splits_total
definition: Total number of splits deleted by the garbage collector.
absence_means: No janitor running (GC not happening)

name: quickwit_quickwit_janitor_gc_deleted_bytes_total
definition: Total bytes deleted by the garbage collector from object storage.
absence_means: No janitor running (storage leak risk)

name: quickwit_quickwit_janitor_gc_runs_total
definition: Total number of garbage collector executions. Labeled by outcome (context.result).
absence_means: No janitor running

name: quickwit_quickwit_janitor_gc_seconds_total
definition: Total time spent running the garbage collector.
absence_means: No janitor running

name: quickwit_cli_thread_unpark_duration_microseconds
definition: Histogram of thread unpark durations. Indicates thread scheduling latency.
absence_means: No data or thread pool not instrumented

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: Quickwit itself does not expose cost metrics. Proxy: S3 request rates (quickwit_storage_object_storage_gets_total quickwit_storage_object_storage_puts_total) and S3 transfer bytes correlate directly with cloud storage costs. Compute costs correlate with memory and CPU usage.
